contract_meta.phase_name: Autonomous Transition — Trust Spine & LangGraph Foundation
contract_meta.enhancement: Establishes TypeScript-only autonomous coding platform with Fortune 500-grade trust spine, feature-flagged LangGraph orchestration, and evidence-driven governance per ADR-019.
contract_meta.rationale: The MVP successfully executes single-task workflows via StepQueue but lacks enterprise-scale autonomy requirements: supply chain attestation (CycloneDX/SLSA), standardized error contracts (RFC 9457), LLM observability (OpenTelemetry), multi-agent orchestration (LangGraph), and human-in-the-loop controls (HITL/MCP). Phase 19 implements the Trust Spine foundation (T0) and feature-flagged orchestrator infrastructure (M1-partial) to enable controlled rollout of autonomous capabilities while maintaining CDI rigor and rollback safety.

project.name: UMCA Executor MVP
project.goal: Implement Trust Spine (CycloneDX SBOM, SLSA provenance, OpenTelemetry, JSONL logs, RFC 9457 errors) and complete LangGraph orchestrator infrastructure (adapter, graph stub, executions store) under feature flags to enable Fortune 500-grade autonomous coding with human oversight and rollback safety.
project.scope: Trust Spine implementation (T0), LangGraph infrastructure completion (M1-partial: adapter, graph, executions), governance document updates (AGENTS.md, CDI_INFRASTRUCTURE.md), contract naming standardization, RFC 9457 corrections, evidence collection for Gate G2.
project.estimated_time: Trust Spine: 8-10 hours, Documentation: 4-5 hours, Testing: 4-5 hours, Evidence: 2-3 hours. Total: 20-26 hours (~3-4 working days)
project.work_profile: Backend infrastructure (TypeScript), CI scripts (JavaScript), documentation updates (Markdown), test additions (Vitest), evidence collection (JSONL/JSON)
out_of_scope: HITL chat UI implementation (Phase 19 U1 - future milestone)
MCP tool governance (Phase 19 U1 - future milestone)
Policy gates integration (Phase 19 P1 - future milestone)
Edge deployment adapters (Phase 19 E2 - optional future)
Python code or frameworks (forbidden by ai-stack.json)
Frontend frameworks in /public (vanilla JS only per stack constraints)

execution_model.verification_strategy: Phase 19/20 discovery already completed (phase19_autonomous_transition_discovery.json, phase20_langgraph_exec_discovery.json). Execute Trust Spine implementations, validate via CI commands, collect evidence bundle for Gate G2, update GATES_LEDGER.
execution_model.description: Discovery artifacts exist with 8 integration points mapped. Implement Trust Spine components (CycloneDX, SLSA, OTel, JSONL, RFC 9457 fixes), complete LangGraph infrastructure (executions store done in Phase 20), add tests, collect evidence for G2 gate, and update governance documents.

rollback_plan.description: All changes are feature-flagged or additive; no breaking changes to existing StepQueue pipeline.
steps: Unset PROBLEM_DETAILS_ENABLED in prod (legacy error format remains default)
StepQueue pipeline continues unchanged; new scripts are opt-in via npm commands

constraints: Frontend under /public only (vanilla JS/CSS, no React/Vue/Angular)
New dependencies require explicit justification in discovery notes
No breaking API changes to existing /api/* endpoints

new_dependencies_justified.@cyclonedx/cyclonedx-npm: CycloneDX 1.6 SBOM generation per ADR-019 Trust Spine requirements
new_dependencies_justified.@sigstore/cli: SLSA v1.0 provenance generation per ADR-019 Trust Spine requirements
new_dependencies_justified.@opentelemetry/api: GenAI span tracing per ADR-019 observability requirements
new_dependencies_justified.@opentelemetry/sdk-node: OTel SDK for Node.js per ADR-019 observability requirements
new_dependencies_justified.@opentelemetry/instrumentation-http: HTTP instrumentation per ADR-019 observability requirements
new_dependencies_justified.@opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-http: OTLP HTTP exporter for trace data per ADR-019 observability requirements
new_dependencies_justified.@opentelemetry/resources: Resource definitions for service metadata per ADR-019 observability requirements
new_dependencies_justified.@opentelemetry/semantic-conventions: Semantic conventions for GenAI spans per ADR-019 observability requirements

stack_compliance.validation: Contract schema validation + CI guardrails + CDI evidence bundle checks

env_vars_defaults.PROBLEM_DETAILS_ENABLED: auto (default: on in dev/test, off in prod)

observability.description: Track Trust Spine implementation progress, LangGraph infrastructure completion, evidence collection for Gate G2, and governance document updates.

gates.name: Inception/Constraints
acceptance: Constraints file updated: TS-only, Node 20, no Python
Decision window & budget recorded
Source log (>=3 authoritative per option) attached

gates.name: Architecture ADR
acceptance: ADR-019 approved and documented
Graph diagram attached (Mermaid)
Alternatives & risk memo included

gates.name: Trust-Spine Baseline
acceptance: CycloneDX 1.6 SBOM generated via npm run sbom:cyclonedx
SLSA v1.0 provenance emitted via npm run provenance
OTel GenAI traces functional with OTEL_ENABLED=1
JSONL action logs stored when ACTION_LOG_JSONL=1
RFC 9457 error envelopes present with corrections applied

gates.name: Orchestrator Pilot (Feature-flagged)
gates.note: Adapter, graph stub, executions store completed in Phase 20. Awaits G2 Trust Spine completion before advancing to parity tests and performance benchmarks.
acceptance: POST /api/execute uses LangGraph when AGENTS_RUNTIME=langgraph
Deterministic replay (seeded) proven
Coverage >= 90% (orchestrator), branch >= 75%
Overhead < 500 ms/transition (p50)
Parity tests passing; StepQueue remains fallback

gates.name: HITL + MCP
gates.note: Future milestone (Phase 19 U1). Requires G2 Trust Spine and G3 Orchestrator completion first.
acceptance: HITL approvals enforced in UI/WS stream
MCP tools audited with allow-list policy
Tool calls present in SIEM feed (IDs, inputs, results)
Zero HIGH-risk policy findings (ASVS/LLM-Top10)

tasks.title: Implement CycloneDX SBOM generation
tasks.description: Install @cyclonedx/cyclonedx-npm, create scripts/generate-cyclonedx.js, add npm run sbom:cyclonedx command, test generation, update CI workflow.
actions: npm install --save-dev @cyclonedx/cyclonedx-npm
Create scripts/generate-cyclonedx.js with error handling
Add sbom:cyclonedx and sbom:all scripts to package.json
Test: npm run sbom:cyclonedx produces sbom.cdx.json
Update .github/workflows/cdi-validation.yml with CycloneDX step
Add sbom.cdx.json to .gitignore
success_criteria: CycloneDX CLI installed as dev dependency
Generation script exists and runs without errors
CI workflow updated to generate and upload artifact
npm run sbom:all generates both SPDX and CycloneDX

tasks.title: Implement SLSA provenance generation
tasks.description: Install @sigstore/cli or implement SLSA v1.0 provenance generation, create scripts/generate-provenance.js, add npm run provenance command, test generation.
actions: npm install --save-dev @sigstore/cli (or alternative)
Create scripts/generate-provenance.js implementing SLSA v1.0 format
Generate SHA256 hashes of build artifacts (dist/, sbom files)
Add provenance script to package.json
Test: npm run provenance produces provenance.intoto.jsonl
Update CI workflow to generate provenance after build

tasks.title: Implement JSONL action log dual-write
tasks.description: Extend src/telemetry/events.ts:logEvent() to dual-write to .automation/actions.jsonl when ACTION_LOG_JSONL=1, add tests for dual-write behavior.
actions: Add actionLogEnabled() helper checking ACTION_LOG_JSONL env var
Extend logEvent() to append to .automation/actions.jsonl when enabled
Add error handling for file write failures (warn, don't fail)
Add unit test verifying dual-write when flag enabled
Add unit test verifying no dual-write when flag disabled

validation.cmd: ACTION_LOG_JSONL=1 npm run dev & sleep 2 && test -f .automation/actions.jsonl && kill %1

success_criteria: No dual-write when flag disabled (backward compatible)
Write failures logged as warnings, not errors
Tests validate both enabled and disabled states

tasks.title: Implement OpenTelemetry GenAI spans
tasks.description: Install OTel packages, implement src/telemetry/otel.ts with NodeSDK initialization, wire into server.ts startup, add graceful shutdown, test with OTEL_ENABLED=1.
actions: npm install --save @opentelemetry/api @opentelemetry/sdk-node @opentelemetry/instrumentation-http @opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-http @opentelemetry/resources @opentelemetry/semantic-conventions
Replace otel.ts placeholder with full NodeSDK implementation
Configure OTLP exporter with env-based endpoint
Add service.name and service.version to Resource
Wire maybeInitTelemetry() into server.ts early startup
Add shutdownTelemetry() to SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers
Test: OTEL_ENABLED=1 npm run dev initializes telemetry
Add unit test for otel init with flag on/off
success_criteria: OTel SDK installed and initialized when OTEL_ENABLED=1
No initialization when flag disabled (no overhead)
OTLP exporter configured with env variable
Graceful shutdown wired into server lifecycle
Console log confirms 'OpenTelemetry initialized' when enabled

tasks.title: Fix RFC 9457 problem details implementation
tasks.description: Correct src/middleware/problemDetails.ts: fix extension naming (urn:ts → occurred_at), add HTTP reason phrase for about:blank, add toValidationProblem helper, enable by default in dev/test.
actions: Replace 'urn:ts' with 'occurred_at' in toProblem()
Add getHttpReasonPhrase() helper for about:blank titles
Update toProblem() to use HTTP reason phrase when type is about:blank
Add toValidationProblem() helper with JSON Pointer errors format
Update problemDetailsEnabled() to default-on in dev/test, default-off in prod
Add unit tests for RFC 9457 compliance (title, status, occurred_at, errors format)
success_criteria: RFC 9457 extension naming corrected (no colons in field names)
HTTP reason phrases used for about:blank type
Validation error helper available with JSON Pointer format
Backward compatible (legacy JSON errors in prod by default)

Create tests/trust-spine/provenance.test.ts testing SLSA attestation
Create tests/telemetry/actions-log.test.ts testing dual-write

Extend tests/api/errors.test.ts with RFC 9457 format validation
Test JSON Pointer validation error format
Ensure all tests pass: npm test
success_criteria: All Trust Spine components have test coverage

cp sbom.cdx.json .automation/evidence/G2/

rollback_safety: AGENTS_RUNTIME defaults to stepqueue (no breaking change)

notes.phase_20_context: Phase 20 (LangGraph executions endpoint) was completed before Phase 19 contract finalization. Executions store, GET /api/executions/:id endpoint, and tests are already implemented and validated. Phase 20 work is included in G3 Orchestrator Pilot gate evidence.
notes.future_milestones: After G2 Trust Spine completion, next milestones are: U1 (HITL/MCP), P1 (Policy Gates), O1 (Deep Observability), MA2 (Multi-Agent Specialization), E2 (Edge Deployment - optional).
notes.rollback_instructions: Unset feature flags to immediately revert to StepQueue pipeline. No data migration or schema changes required.
notes.dependency_justifications: All new dependencies serve Fortune 500 compliance requirements (CycloneDX/SLSA for supply chain, OTel for observability). No frameworks added; CLI tools and SDK only.
